patient_summary: Patient Olivia, age 73. Demographics record Female (multiple sources) with conflicting legal sex entry in one record. Key active problems documented include mixed dyslipidemia (noted as primary), essential hypertension, postoperative/unspecified anemia, leg pain, and hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus (documented separately). Significant labs: 07/03/2023 lipid panel with Triglycerides 158 (H), Cholesterol 147, HDL 54, LDL 62; iron studies 07/03/2023 show Iron 41 (L), Iron saturation 15% (L), Ferritin 266.8 (H); eGFR CKD-EPI 58 ml/min/1.73m2 (07/03/2023). Major planned procedure: COLONOSCOPY WITH BIOPSY scheduled 02/21/2025. Functional assessments vary across encounters; note conflicts regarding dressing/bathing and ability to do errands. Multiple care team providers across Singing River and Piedmont systems.
